title: Method of amending articles generally
doc_html:
PART III.  AMENDMENT AND RESTATEMENT OF ARTICLES

§31.  Repealed by Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.

Acts 1968, No. 105, §1; Acts 1970, No. 50, §2, emerg. eff. June 18, 1970, at 5:05 P.M; Acts 1990, No. 849, §1, eff. for taxable years after Dec. 31, 1989; Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
doc_text:
PART III.  AMENDMENT AND RESTATEMENT OF ARTICLES
§31.  Repealed by Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
Acts 1968, No. 105, §1; Acts 1970, No. 50, §2, emerg. eff. June 18, 1970, at 5:05 P.M; Acts 1990, No. 849, §1, eff. for taxable years after Dec. 31, 1989; Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
